findings.summary: npm pack ran no build, so the proof packed stale dist/ — a live sabotage of src/cli.ts stayed GREEN (false green decoupled from source); fixed with a prepack script replacing prepublishOnly, sabotage replicated post-fix and observed RED with the sabotaged string

silent scope drop of vfkb init from the ADR-0057 fresh-arm contract — added as a content-asserted check (scaffold line + approval notice verified against src/init.ts output), observed PASS in fresh and FAIL in contrast
PR body overclaimed the MCP assertion ('fields present' vs actual result+name equality) — corrected by PR comment; assertion itself now strengthened to version equality

ENGINE_VERSION fell back to 0.0.0-dev under tsc builds so the npm-installed MCP server misreported its version — fallback now reads the package's own manifest; scenario asserts serverInfo.version equals package.json (observed 0.1.0 in-container); unit test added
--version with a trailing arg ignores the extra token, matching pre-existing --help behavior; no data-affecting flag is dropped so not the #95 class
